actors.text: Test H0: p=0.30 vs Ha: p>0.30. We got p-hat=0.38, z=1.74, p-value=0.041. Interpret 0.041.
There is a 4.1% chance H0 is true
actors.reflection: A p-value is NOT the probability that H0 is true. H0 is treated as given; the p-value is a probability under H0.

actors.text: Assuming p=0.30, the probability of getting p-hat >= 0.38 (or more extreme) is 0.041

actors.reflection: The p-value is a probability for the test statistic under H0, not a percentage of the population. The sample proportion was 38%, not 4.1%.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
